name: Spinach'n Strawberry Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, trim, and dry the spinach. Refrigerate.
2. Toast the sesame seeds on a pie pan in a preheated 350°F oven, shaking once or twice until golden (10-12 minutes); cool.
3. Combine the oil, vinegar, sugar, onions, salt, pepper, and tabasco sauce in a tightly covered container. Shake until the sugar and salt are dissolved. Refrigerate.
4. To serve: Tear the spinach into bite-sized pieces. Add the sesame seeds to the salad bowl. Toss with the dressing. Gently toss in the strawberries.
